UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: A user's profile information within the SquadForge application, including personal details and preferences.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

fullName.description: The full name of the user.

avatarUrl.description: URL to the user's optional avatar image.

role.description: The primary role of the user in the system.

notificationsEnabled.description: Indicates if the user has globally enabled push notifications.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

Team.title: Team
Team.description: Represents a sports team within the SquadForge application, managed by users.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Team entity.

sport.description: The sport associated with the team.

teamLogoUrl.description: URL to the team's optional logo image.

teamCode.description: A unique 6-character alphanumeric code used for joining the team.

createdBy.description: Reference to the UserProfile ID of the user who created this team.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the team was created.

isPro.description: Whether the team is on a Pro subscription tier.

definition.description: Stores user's private profile information. Document ID matches UID.

firestore.reasoning: Standardized on /users hierarchy to match existing implementation and ensure provable security rules for both live and demo accounts.
